alerts.message: Score or positive rate shift critical

severity_overview.attention_priority: Address CRITICAL alerts first (block or escalate), then WARNING (triage and fix). INFO is contextual only unless your runbook says otherwise.

primary_issues: [CRITICAL] Score or positive rate shift critical
recommended_actions: Investigate high-drift features vs the reference window: check definitions, ingestion, and whether the cohort mix changed materially.
Review model calibration and business thresholds; plan validation, rollback, or refresh if score or positive-rate shift persists.
